title: Solid Entity Hitboxes
description: This server-side mod makes certain entity hitboxes solid
body:
# Solid Entity Hitboxes
This mod makes entity hitboxes solid, and is completely server-side! Unlike other mods, this mod works seamlessly on servers. It uses cutting edge shulker technology to make entities' hitboxes solid, so you can climb on them. Sadly, due to datapack limitations, players cannot be supported.

### Mobs (currently) Supported
- Villager
- Snow_golem
- Vindicator
- Wandering_trader
- Witch
- Zombie
- Zombie_villager
- Zombified_piglin
- Stray
- Piglin
- Piglin_brute
- Pillager
- Husk
- Creeper
- Drowned
- Bogged
- Evoker
